description: Configure the properties of the existing dashboard named 'My Dashboard' to prepare it for a public kiosk display. Rename the dashboard to 'Oakwood Plaza Energy Monitor' and set the description to 'Real-time energy and solar monitoring for Oakwood Plaza retail building'. Enable public access and set the URL alias (slug) to 'oakwood-plaza'.

metadata.expected_description: Real-time energy and solar monitoring for Oakwood Plaza retail building
